verses.text: Tua ciangin a mipa in a laizanga om inndei-ah hong paipih hi. Tua inndei lutna lampi teh a
pi sawmlegiat zai a, a pang tuaka om kawmte pi giat tuak a sah hi. A laizanga om inndei sung a teh ciangin pi sawmgukgiat sau a, pi sawmthumli zai hi
Tua ciangin inndei sungnungah amah pai a, tua sung lutna lampi a teh ciangin pi thum sau-in pi sawm zai a, a pang tuaka om kawmte pi sawmlenih tuak a sah hi
Tua inndei sungnung a teh ciangin a dung a vai pi sawmthumli tuak a pha hi. Tua ciangin amah in kei kiangah, “Hih lai pen Siangtho Pen Mun ahi hi,” hong ci hi
Tua ciangin amah in biakinn kawm puanung teh a, pi sawm tak a sah hi. Hih kawm tawh a kimatin biakinn kimkotah inndei neuneu om a, tuate pi sagih vive a zai hi

Hih inndei neute dawl thum pha a, dawl khat gual paiphei suakah inndei neu sawmthum om hi. Tua inndei neute a dawl sanna tawh kizui-in a biakinn kawm pa to tektek a, tua inndei neute a nang dingin khuam a tuamin kulloin a biakinn kawm kimang toto hi

Tua biakinn kawm pang bela kibawl inndei neute sungah kahlei omto a, a dawl nuainung panin a tungnung dongin kizomto hi. A inndei neute a dawl sanna lamah a biakinn kawm a pat tektek mah bangin a sang lama om inndei neute a sung zai semsem hi
Biakinn kimkotteng a lei kitawito a, a mundangte sangin pi sawmin sangtozaw hi. Tua mun panin biakinn kawm leh a kimkota inndei neute kipanto pan hi
Inndei neute a kawm sahna pi giat pha a
biakinn kimkotah suangphah bangin a kitawito-in a kibawl a zaina pi sawmthumli ahi hi
Biakinn kimkotah a om inndei neute-ah paina ding kongvang, leilu lamah khat omin, leitaw lamah khat om hi. Tua biakinn kimkotah pi giat paisuak a zai cial khat a om leuleu hi
Tua ciangin nitumna lamah biakinn lam a nga inn khat om hi. A inn dung pi za khat sawmnga hi a, a vai pi za khat sawmleguk hi a, a kimkota a kawm pi kua a sah hi
Tua ciangin mipa in biakinn teh a, pi za khat sawmgukgiat a pha hi. A kimkota mun awng, a innsung leh a kawm tawh kigawmin pi za khat sawmgukgiat ahi hi
Nisuahna lampang biakinn mailam a vailam zong a mun awng tawh kigawmin pi za khat sawmgukgiat mah ahi hi

Tua ciangin biakinn nitumna lampangah a om, a tual lam a nga inn a sauna teh a, a kawmte gel tawh kigawmin pi za khat sawmgukgiat mah a pha hi. Biakinnsung lutna ding inndei, leh a inndeipi, leh Siangtho Pen Munsungte pen
a sual panin a kongvangneute ciangdong singpeek tawh kidap hi. A tawlette pen a pualam a kihui-in a kibawl ahi hi
Biakinn sunglam kawmte pen kongkhak zang ciangdong lim kibawlte tawh kidim a
nisuh kungte leh kherub limte vive ahi hi. A masa-in nisuh kung, tua ciangin kherub, nisuh kung, kherub cih bangin a kimkot khempeuhah kihelhto dimdiam hi. Tua kherub-te in maitang nih ciat nei uh hi
A mihing maitang pen a pangkhat lama om nisuh kung lam nga a, a humpinelkai maitang pen a pang langkhat lama om nisuh kung lam a nga hi. A biakinnsung kimkotah hih bangin kibawl a
sual panin kongkhak zang kikal sung khempeuhah a dimin a om hi
Biakinn deipi kongkhak khuamte pen a siik kikim vive ahi hi

Tua ciangin Siangtho Pen Mun mai-ah sing tawh a kibawl biakna tau bang pian khat a om hi. Pi nga sang a, a dung a vai pi li ahi hi. A khete, a kingaknate, leh a zawlte sing tawh a kibawl ahi hi. A mipa in kei kiangah, “Hih pen Topa' mai-ah a kikoih sabuai ahi hi,” hong ci hi
Inndeipi sung lutna ding leh Siangtho Pen Mun lutna dingah kongkhak a om hi
Tua kongkhakte pen a laizangah a kituah, kongkhak peek nih nei-in a kibawl ahi hi

Biakinnsung kawmte tungah a kibawl mah bangin hih biakinn deipi sung lutna-a kongkhakte tungah zong nisuh kung leh kherub mah a kibawl hi. Kongkhak pualam, innsung lutna ding inndei sanah singpeek tawh limsun khat a kibawl hi
Hih inndeipi sung kawmte tungah a pualam a kihui tawlette om a, nisuh kungte tawh zepna zong a kibawl hi.
